Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.state

Class LinkedListObservable<E>

java.lang.Object
net.apartium.cocoabeans.state.LinkedListObservable<E>
Type Parameters:
E - the type of elements in this collection
All Implemented Interfaces:
CollectionObservable<E,LinkedList<E>>, ListLikeObservable<E>, Observable<LinkedList<E>>, QueueObservable<E,LinkedList<E>>
@AvailableSince("0.0.50") public class LinkedListObservable<E> extends Object implements ListLikeObservable<E>, QueueObservable<E,LinkedList<E>>
A concrete implementation of an observable linked list that allows observing changes such as additions, removals, and structural modifications. This class extends AbstractCollectionObservable and implements AbstractListObservable and QueueObservable.
See Also:
  • AbstractCollectionObservable
  • ListLikeObservable
  • QueueObservable

    • offer

      public boolean offer(E element)
      Description copied from interface: QueueObservable
      Offers the specified element for insertion into the queue if it is possible to do so immediately without violating capacity restrictions.
      Specified by:
      offer in interface QueueObservable<E,LinkedList<E>>
      Parameters:
      element - the element to be added to the queue
      Returns:
      true if the element was successfully added, otherwise false

      public E remove()
      Description copied from interface: QueueObservable
      Removes the head of the queue.
      Specified by:

      Returns:
      the element that was removed from the head of the queue

      public E poll()
      Description copied from interface: QueueObservable
      Retrieves and removes the head of the queue, or returns null if the queue is empty.
      Specified by:

      Returns:
      the head of the queue, or null if the queue is empty

    • element

      public E element()
      Description copied from interface: QueueObservable
      Retrieves, but does not remove, the head of the queue. This method throws an exception if the queue is empty.
      Specified by:
      element in interface QueueObservable<E,LinkedList<E>>
      Returns:
      the head of the queue

    • size

      public Observable<Integer> size()
      Description copied from interface: CollectionObservable
      Returns an observable representing the size of the observable. When the size of the current observable changes, the size observable will emit the new size.
      Specified by:
      size in interface CollectionObservable<E,C extends Collection<E>>
      Returns:
      size observable

    • filter

      public CollectionObservable<E,LinkedList<E>> filter(Function<E,Observable<Boolean>> filter)
      Description copied from interface: CollectionObservable
      Filters the elements of this observable based on the provided filter function. Only elements for which the provided function evaluates to an observable that emits true will be included in the resulting observable.
      Specified by:
      filter in interface CollectionObservable<E,C extends Collection<E>>
      Parameters:
      filter - a function that takes an element of type E as input and returns an Observable of Boolean indicating whether the element should be included.
      Returns:
      a new CollectionObservable containing the filtered elements.
